name: lazyreel-mcp
description: LazyReel: an MCP server that gives a coding agent genuinely good short-form / UGC video marketing skills (ideation, niche analysis, format teardown, hooks, shoot briefs, anti-slop rewrites).

scripts.bundle: npm run build && npx --yes esbuild build/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=build/server.mjs && chmod +x build/server.mjs
